case_title: LETISHA HUMPHREY VS. BAYVIEW PRESERVATION L.P.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMPHREY, LETISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,970.00 FILED BY HUMPHREY, LETISHA AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PRESERVATION L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PRESERVATION L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LETISHA HUMPHREY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PRESERVATION LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHE JONES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMPHREY, LETISHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PRESERVATION L.P. $2,970.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,970.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
